name: National Gallery of Zimbabwe
description: Zimbabwe's national institution for visual arts. Supporting Paivapo's work to broaden access to cultural knowledge.

name: Book Aid International
description: Works with libraries across Africa to provide access to books and support reading.

name: Zimbabwe Culture Fund
description: Supports cultural initiatives and creative projects across Zimbabwe.

name: Harare Arts Trust
description: Supports artistic development and cultural exchange in Harare.
